issues.tradition_claim: Birth follows death and death follows birth in the unavoidable cycle of saṁsāra (per Shankara, Ramanuja, Sridhara); grief over what is structurally inevitable is irrational.
issues.engineering_claim: Whatever ships has a deprecation ahead of it. Whatever gets deprecated has a replacement ahead of that.
issues.explanation: The engineering layer rescopes the metaphysical cycle of birth-and-death to the operational cycle of deployment-and-deprecation. The argumentative shape is preserved (paired symmetric inevitability) and the project's additive-layer mandate authorizes the rescoping. No weakening, no contradiction, no inversion.
